About Me

Where code
meets creativity.

Information Technology graduate with a dual identity — technically fluent in backend systems and database architecture, while also deeply embedded in Uganda's digital marketing landscape. I've built things with Python, PHP, and SQL, and I've moved audiences for top-tier brands across East Africa. That intersection is where I live.

Backend Dev
Python, PHP, Java, C — server-side logic & scripting
Databases
SQL, database design & management, BI & warehousing
Systems
Networking, sysadmin, IoT, mobile computing
Digital Marketing
Campaign strategy, content creation, influencer reach
Web & Mobile
HTML, CSS, web design & mobile app programming
AI & Analytics
AI fundamentals, business intelligence, data insights
